# Oyster HR Official Product + Pricing Pages (2026)

## Summary
Authoritative Oyster pricing as of May 2026. **Resolves OQ-5: official EOR price is $699/employee/month, not the $499-$599 range cited in comparison sources.** The $499 figure may have been a promotional/Essentials tier no longer publicly priced. Oyster is a B-Corp certified EOR with 180+ country coverage, transparent pricing, and a meaningful "Oyster for Startups" program offering up to $1,200 in savings. Also notable: Oyster has a US PEO tier at $114/employee/month and offers People Partner Services (white-glove HR advisory) at $300/hour.

## Key quotations / statistics
- **Confirmed 2026 official pricing:**
  - Employer of Record: $699/month/employee (annual discounts available)
  - Global Contractors: $29/month/contractor (free for 30 days)
  - Global Payroll: $29/month/employee
  - US PEO: $114/month/employee
  - People Partner Services: $300/hour (white-glove HR advisory)
- **EOR included features:** Compliant employment in 120+ countries; multi-country payroll in 120+ currencies; automated expenses, time-off, reports; onboarding and offboarding specialists; end-to-end support by local experts; no extra fees for setup, onboarding, offboarding, HR expert access
- **Refundable deposit required to initiate EOR engagement** (specific amount not disclosed publicly)
- **EOR add-ons:** Benefits package (country-specific); Visa sponsorship (immigration support); Salary Insights (salary bands for 130+ countries); People Partner Services (project-based senior HR advisory)
- **Contractor add-ons:** **Oyster Shell — misclassification risk protection up to $500,000**
- **Global Payroll add-ons:** Payment Processing (outsource salary/tax/statutory payments)
- **Special programs:**
  - Oyster for Nonprofits/B-Corps — discounts for impact-driven companies
  - Oyster for Refugees — free or discounted hiring of refugee talent
  - **Oyster for Startups — save up to $1,200 on EOR fees**
- **Billing:** USD, EUR, GBP, CAD; direct debit or wire transfer; annual seat-based billing option at reduced rates (seats are reusable)
- **Free to create account and explore platform; fees only kick in when worker is engaged**
- **2025-2026 awards:** Lighthouse Tech Awards 2026 (Best Global Solution in Core HR/Workforce); G2 Spring 2026 (Best ROI for any global employment platform); UNLEASH HR Tech Award 2025; SaaS Awards 2025; TIARA Tech Awards 2024
- **Coverage:** 180+ countries (broadest EOR coverage of the three platforms compared)
- **B-Corp certification** — emphasized in marketing as a differentiator for impact-driven companies

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- **CRITICAL UPDATE for `guides/03-international-eor.md`:** Oyster EOR is $699/month at standard pricing — comparison-article sources citing $499/$599 should be marked as outdated or promotional. The $499-$599 figure likely refers to legacy "Essentials" tier no longer publicly offered or to the "Oyster for Startups" discount program
- **Oyster Shell at $500K misclassification protection is a unique product** in the EOR/contractor comparison set — neither Deel nor Remote offer a contractor-misclassification insurance product at this coverage level. Surface in `guides/02-classification-matrix.md` as a meaningful risk-mitigation option for companies retaining contractors in high-risk jurisdictions
- The **B-Corp certification + "Oyster for Refugees" + "Oyster for Nonprofits"** programs make Oyster the recommended choice for mission-driven and impact companies — surface as a values-based selection factor in `guides/03-international-eor.md`
- **180+ country coverage** is the broadest of any platform compared and meaningfully exceeds Remote (90+) and Deel (150+) — recommend Oyster as the default for emerging-market hiring decisions
- The "Oyster for Startups" program (save up to $1,200) is a meaningful procurement lever — surface in the startup-specific section of the EOR guide
- People Partner Services at $300/hour is an unusual offering — useful for the "we have one weird HR situation and need expert advisory without committing to ongoing fees" use case
- Note that Oyster offers US PEO at $114/employee — competitive with Justworks PEO Plus ($109) but slightly higher; less mature than Justworks for US-specific use cases
